suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that verification-only features may not have associated code commits. When a feature's expectedBehavior is purely verification (no implementation required), workers should still create a descriptive commit documenting what was verified and the verification results, rather than having no git trail at all.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: curl-testing feature (e81ff85 commit) actually contains FACTORY-DROID.md documentation, not curl verification. No git history exists for curl-testing verification work.

rejectedObservations.observation: services.yaml stop command uses broad pkill patterns that could match unintended processes
rejectedObservations.reason: pre-existing issue from foundation milestone, not introduced by universal-clients workers. Not within scope of this milestone to fix.
minor documentation gap, not blocking. The oh-my-pi integration docs (docs/OH-MY-PI.md) already document all prerequisites inline. Library update not urgent.

rejectedObservations.observation: VAL-CLIENT-003 model list returns empty when unauthenticated, contradicting requirement that models should be 'accessible before auth check'
rejectedObservations.reason: already captured in validation-state.json as an environment limitation (cursor-agent not authenticated). Not a code defect discovered in this review.

issues.description: Full end-to-end verification with OpenCode client was not performed - cursor-agent not authenticated in environment
Tool calling verification was not performed - expected behavior includes 'Tool calling works in OpenCode context' but was not tested

featureReviews.notes: Created comprehensive 281-line OpenCode integration documentation using @ai-sdk/openai-compatible provider. VAL-CLIENT-001 passed.

issues.description: Handoff claims '47 models' but only 45 are listed (llama2 in the ollama example is not a Cursor model)

featureReviews.notes: Created comprehensive 291-line oh-my-pi integration documentation covering pi.registerProvider() extension API, 45 Cursor Pro models, and all configuration steps.
Created 355-line FACTORY-DROID.md documenting Factory Droid integration via .factory/services.yaml. Worker verified services.yaml is valid YAML.

issues.description: Commit traceability gap - curl-testing verification not represented in git history (e81ff85 is FACTORY-DROID.md docs)
VAL-CLIENT-003 model list behavior (empty when unauthenticated) not flagged as potential contradiction

featureReviews.notes: Verified all proxy endpoints respond correctly to curl: /health (200), /v1/models (200), /v1/chat/completions (400 expected auth error). VAL-CLIENT-002 passed.
